name: PSEUDOANGIOMATOUS STROMAL HYPERPLASIA
definition: PASH = benign hormonally stimulated mesenchymal myofibroblastic proliferation of mammary

demographics.Histo: (a) incidental focal microscopic finding in 23% of all breast specimens
demographics.Age: 4th-5th decade (range, 14-67 years); frequently in pre- and perimenopausal women

dominant_finding: commonly persistent (type 1) or less frequently plateau (type 2) / washout (type 3)
discriminating_features: dense well / partially circumscribed noncalcified mass
